svg.title: BTC Price and Full Conviction Oscillator
svg.desc: 2010-07-18 to 2026-05-23. BTC price uses full history; oscillator uses full-model conviction anchor scores.
svg.text: BTC Price and Full Conviction Oscillator
2010-07-18 to 2026-05-23. BTC price uses full history; oscillator uses full-model conviction anchor scores.
Full 14-indicator conviction anchor scores. Dashed oscillator connects anchor points only; 31-84% is intentionally unshaded.
